name: @piflow/daytona
description: Pi Flow ↔ Daytona connector — the Daytona cloud-sandbox backend for @piflow/core's sandbox seam, packaged as a CHOOSE-TO-INSTALL extension. `npm i @piflow/daytona` and `piflowctl run --sandbox daytona` boots one long-lived Daytona VM per run (per-node workdir subtrees, torn down once) — boot from a pre-built snapshot (the promoted `piflow-node-runtime`) with the pi gateway credential allowlisted into the VM.
author: blueif16
